ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the game session in seconds */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the game session was played (e.g., iOS, Android) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used for the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the player during the session (e.g., country, city) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., practice, tournament) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the player (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "total_play_time" REAL /* Total time the player has spent playing the game */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object to store player preferences (e.g., sound settings, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "estimated_completion_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the level */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* JSON object to store potential rewards for completing the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the progress */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the player progressed through */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player in the level */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken by the player in the level */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Time elapsed by the player in the level */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the player to complete the level */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the level has been completed */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score achieved by the player in the level */,
  "best_time" REAL /* Best time achieved by the player in the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard for the given date */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, all-time) */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level for which the leaderboard is being tracked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone required to achieve the reward (e.g., complete level 3) */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., in-game currency, extra lives) */,
  "reward_value" TEXT /* Value of the reward (e.g., 100 coins, 5 extra lives) */,
  "unlock_conditions" TEXT /* JSON object to store conditions for unlocking the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)
